Criteria.name: Reliability Score (/100)
Criteria.description: Estimated reliability score for the model, where a higher value is better.

Criteria.name: Luxury/Comfort Score (/10)
Criteria.description: Estimated comfort, perceived quality, and onboard equipment score.

Criteria.name: Boot Volume (L)
Criteria.description: Approximate boot capacity in litres with the rear seats in place.

Criteria.name: Safety Rating (Euro NCAP stars)
Criteria.description: Euro NCAP safety rating in stars, or closest published equivalent for the current generation.

Criteria.name: Warranty Length (years)
Criteria.description: Standard new-car warranty length in years for the model or brand in France/Europe.

Criteria.name: Affordability Score (/100)
Criteria.description: Estimated affordability score based on typical French new-car pricing, where a higher value is cheaper to buy.

Criteria.name: Power (hp)
Criteria.description: Representative maximum power in horsepower for a common 2025 French-market version.

Criteria.name: Torque (Nm)
Criteria.description: Representative maximum torque in newton-metres for a common 2025 French-market version.

Criteria.name: 0-100 km/h (s)
Criteria.description: Representative acceleration time from 0 to 100 km/h in seconds.

Criteria.name: Sportiness Score (/10)
Criteria.description: Estimated sportiness score combining acceleration feel, chassis character, and driver appeal.
